docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF LENDORMY, JEAN-YVES AS TO DEFENDANT DROZEK, SOPHIE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DROZEK, SOPHIE $6,823.58 PRINCIPAL, $1,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $549.14 INTEREST, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,532.72

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 501, MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF ORDER, CALENDAR OF JUL-07-1998, DENIED PER CCP 1008; PLAINTIFF TO RECOVER $600.00 AS REASONABLE ATTY'S FEES. B & P 6203C.
